office_does: County commissioners adopt budgets, set county policy, and oversee departments and services.
race_blurb: Five candidates seek the District 3 seat; only Pattie Gray's dossier supplies a substantive current campaign direction.

candidates.summary: Doyle is a filed candidate without a substantive identity-safe platform.
highlights: Official election material verifies his candidacy [S1].

candidates.summary: Runyon is a filed candidate without a substantive identity-safe platform.
highlights: Official election material verifies his candidacy [S1].

candidates.summary: Gray campaigns as a change from current county-government practices and emphasizes constituent representation.

experience.basis: Her campaign explicitly presents an outsider-change profile without a documented government record.

candidates.summary: Mullins is a filed candidate without a substantive identity-safe platform.
highlights: Official election material verifies his candidacy [S1].
